title: Nava-Kailasha Temple
tagline: Nava-Kailasha Temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Naba Kailash Mandir is a Shiva temple in Kalna City of Purba Bardhaman district, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Naba Kailash Mandir is a Shiva temple in Kalna City of Purba Bardhaman district, West Bengal, India. The temple structure, completed in 1809, consists of a combination of two concentric circles with a total of 108 small temples, each dedicated to Shiva. It represents the number of beads on a japamala, and the walls of this temple depict episodes from Mahabharata and Ramayana and many hunting scenes. There are seventy-four temples in the outer circle and thirty-four temples in the inner circle.

topPlaces.name: Siddheshwari Kali Mandir
topPlaces.description: Siddheshwari Kali Mandir (Bengali: [Sid'dhēśbarī kālī mandira] ) is a Śākta temple in Kalna City in Purba Bardhaman district of West Bengal. The Hindu goddess Kali or Kalika is worshiped in the form of Siddheshwari in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Kalna, India
topPlaces.description: Kalna or Ambika Kalna is a town in the Purba Bardhaman district of West Bengal, India. It is the headquarter of the Kalna subdivision, situated on the western bank of the Bhāgirathi river.

topPlaces.name: Shashpur
topPlaces.description: Shashpur is a census town in Kalna II CD Block in Kalna subdivision of Purba Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nava-Kailasha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nava-Kailasha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nava-Kailasha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nava-Kailasha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nava-Kailasha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nava-Kailasha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nava-Kailasha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nava-Kailasha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Siddheshwari Kali Mandir, Kalna, India, Shashpur, Nrisinghapur, Rangapara, Kalna.
